summary: OpenEMR is a PHP 8.2+ monolithic EMR/EHR web application in mid-modernization: a modern PSR-4 layer (src/, OpenEMR\ namespace) with services, REST/FHIR controllers and a Symfony-based kernel/event system sits on top of a legacy procedural layer (library/) and ~590 server-rendered UI pages (interface/), each bootstrapping through interface/globals.php. A patient portal (portal/), two plugin systems (interface/modules/), a Node.js C-CDA side-service (ccdaservice/), Twig/Smarty templates (templates/), a dual schema-change mechanism (sql/ live, db/ Doctrine not yet wired), a webpack theme/asset pipeline, and a large docker+GitHub-Actions dev/CI machine complete the system.

build: composer install (PHP deps; no compile step for PHP)
npm run build (webpack theme compilation + CSS sync -> public/themes/, public/assets/)

test.js: npm run test:js (Jest; specs live under ccdaservice/)
fixture_regen: openemr-cmd update-twig-fixtures (alias utf) after editing render-tested Twig templates
openemr-cmd update-layout-field-fixtures (alias ulff) after changing library/options.inc.php renderer

lint: openemr-cmd code-quality (alias cq) = composer code-quality: codespell + php-syntax-check + phpcbf + phpcs (PSR-12/PER-CS) + phpstan (level 10 + ~18 custom rules in tests/PHPStan/Rules/) + rector-check + require-checker
canonical_commands.notes: All openemr-cmd commands run inside the docker/development-easy container; in a managed worktree prefix with `openemr-cmd worktree exec <branch>`. PHPStan must run on the full codebase, never a subset.

subtrees.purpose: Modern PSR-4 application layer: ~100 domain services (BaseService pattern), REST/FHIR controllers, Symfony kernel/events, cross-cutting Common/ infrastructure.
Legacy procedural helper layer (SQL wrappers, auth bootstrap, escaping, translation, options.inc.php layout renderer); increasingly a thin shim delegating to src/.
~590 server-rendered clinician UI pages, each bootstrapping via interface/globals.php (session, site, DB, auth, globals bag, module boot).
Two plugin systems: Laminas zend_modules MVC app + event-driven custom_modules (oe-module-*), managed by the Installer Module Manager from the DB.
Patient-facing onsite portal with its own session cookie and auth gate (verify_session.php); patient-pid-scoped pages, messaging, payments, e-sign, Phreeze mini-MVC JSON API.
View layer: Twig 3 (majority; autoescape OFF, explicit |text/|attr/|xlt filters), legacy Smarty general_*.html views, plain-PHP CDR admin views.
do_not_touch: calendar |raw sinks paired with src/PostCalendar/ViewModel escaping contract

subtrees.purpose: Test estate: DB-backed suites (phpunit.xml), isolated no-DB (phpunit-isolated.xml), integration config, Panther/Selenium E2E, Jest, bats, plus custom PHPStan/Rector convention rules.
On-demand Node.js TCP daemon (127.0.0.1:6661, 0x1C-delimited XML protocol) converting patient data to C-CDA via vendored blue-button forks; siblings: CQM calc (6660), schematron (6662).

Schema: sql/database.sql (fresh installs) + versioned comment-directive upgrade SQL (the only live mechanism); db/ holds Doctrine Migrations scaffolding explicitly NOT yet integrated (blocked on #10708).
do_not_touch: all historical *_upgrade.sql before the current dev range (append-only)

subtrees.purpose: Asset factory: webpack 5 compiles ~40 theme variants from interface/themes/ SCSS into gitignored public/themes/; npm postinstall (napa + install-assets.js) copies vendored browser libs into gitignored public/assets/.
do_not_touch: public/assets/ (generated; EXCEPT committed public/assets/modified/ which is patched vendor)

subtrees.purpose: Dev stack (docker/development-easy driven by openemr-cmd) and the full CI matrix: ci/<webserver>_<php>_<db> compose dirs whose names ARE the config, quality-gate workflows, docker image pipelines, release tooling, bin/console Symfony CLI.
do_not_touch: GITHUB_COMPOSER_TOKEN* (deliberate public rate-limit token, not a leak)

subtrees.purpose: Front door: index.php site-resolution/login redirect, apis/dispatch.php + oauth2/authorize.php funnel into ApiApplication with route maps in apis/routes/, controller.php dispatches 10 legacy C_* controllers, version.php gates upgrades, embryonic PSR-11 config/.
do_not_touch: sites/ (runtime per-site data incl. live DB creds in sqlconf.php)

edges.description: X -> Y means X depends on Y (imports/includes/calls at build or runtime). Reverse edges = blast radius: dependents of a changed subtree are its review surface.

interface-modules: (none inbound except runtime module loading from interface-core bootstrap)
root-remainder: everything at runtime (entry points); src/library reference custom/code_types.inc.php and version.php

suspected_bugs.headline: Module-global conn/all reassigned per TCP connection with awaits in between — concurrent requests can send one patient's C-CDA to the wrong socket; hardcoded enableDebug=true writes PHI XML to documents/temp/.
apis/dispatch.php returns raw $e->getMessage() in JSON error responses to API clients (information disclosure; violates the project's own error-handling standard).
Dead getenv() ?? fallbacks in tests/Tests/E2e/Base/BaseTrait.php (getenv() returns false, never null, so the 'selenium' host default is unreachable).
